narrative.headline: Karl is picking favorites across the Bay
narrative.summary: Karl is shifting unevenly, with some corridors clearing while others stay gray. Berkeley should brighten around 30–45 minutes.
narrative.movementNarrative: Karl is shifting unevenly, with some corridors clearing while others stay gray.

regionalNarratives.narrative: North Bay is split between sunshine and fog, from Tiburon to Stinson Beach.
San Francisco is split between sunshine and fog, from San Francisco to Ocean Beach.
East Bay is mostly bright, with only light fog in a few spots.
South Bay is split between sunshine and fog, from San Jose to Half Moon Bay.
